title: 3001 ICT Trainer/School/Bukit Batok
description:
School name

Bukit View Primary School

Contract period

From 1 March 2026 to 28 February 2027.

Working hour

  • Mondays to Fridays: 3 days 7:15am to 4:15pm, 2 days 8am to 5pm (8.5 hours per day) excluding half an hour's lunch.
  • Service is not required on Saturdays, Sundays and gazetted public holidays.
  • In event of days where hours run beyond 4:15pm, time-off will be provided on another day.

Job scopes

The scope of services is set out as follows:

  1. Conduct ICT lessons, including coding for P1 to P6 pupils.
  2. Assist in training students for the Infocomm club on coding and related competitions.
  3. Work with teachers on content and resource creation for ICT integration and other IT related design for all school events.
  4. Supervise or conduct afternoon activities that are ICT related / Makerspace activities such as coding, 3D printer etc.
  5. Assist in school functions (i.e. in computer-related presentations, hall sound and projection systems, filming or photography).
  6. Develop overall layout and production designs for banners, cover designs, newsletter, etc. for classroom activities and school events using ICT software.
  7. The successful candidate must sign an Undertaking to safeguard Official Information.

Requirements

Qualification, Skill & Experience of the Contractor’s Personnel

  • Qualification: Shall have at least a Higher Nitec certification in ICT/ Design & Media or equivalent.
  • Experience: Shall have at least 1 year of experience in teaching ICT/coding/robotics lessons. Candidates with experience in teaching primary school students and experience of teaching different ICT tools will be preferred.
  • Skills: Shall be proficient in Adobe Software, Photography, and Videography. Candidates are to provide samples of past works for evaluation.
  • Qualities: Committed and responsible, with good communication skills and able to engage with primary school children.

MaxhuntResource Pte Ltd specialize in identifying, sourcing, shortlisting, and interviewing candidates for jobs ( either permanent, temporary or contract staff ) within an organization.

•Our mission is to be a leader in the manpower placement service industry, providing efficient, cost effective and timely personal manpower solutions to our clients.

•Our philosophy is to provide total quality and service solutions. We recognize that people are the backbone of our business whether they be our clients, our applicants or our staffs.

•Our company goal is to gain recognition for our staffing solutions, to discover new opportunities for growth, to support customers’ work-life is our value. Aside from business, we also put great effort to contribute for a better society.
